DISCOVERY 302, - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR ALEXANDER PERAZA WAIVED ALL OBJECTIONS TO THE DISCOVERY PROPOUNDED BY FAILING TO RESPOND TO IT. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $340.00. calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ALEXANDER PERAZA, TEL. NO. 235-0902, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S MOTION To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions IS GRANTED. Judgment debtor Alexander Peraza waived all objections to the discovery propounded by failing to respond to it. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340.00. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. Pro Tem Judge: Ernest Halperin, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JPT

Appearance:
Robert F. Cohen, Esq., 800-492-2657, Specially appearing for Assignee and moving party
